donovan mitchell.detail: Played 32 minutes, no confirmed mid-game exit; prior Game 1 lower-body concern noted but no confirmed exit in this game
donovan mitchell.web_narrative: Mitchell finished with only 1 assist against a prop of over 2. The blowout loss (130-93) likely reduced his late-game opportunities, and he may have been managing a lower-body issue noted from Game 1, but no explicit explanation for the assist miss is confirmed.

evan mobley.detail: Played 33 minutes in a blowout loss with normal stat line

jalen brunson.detail: Played 31 minutes in a blowout win; slightly reduced minutes consistent with garbage time in a 37-point victory

james harden.detail: Played 33 minutes; went 0-6 from three in a blowout loss, cold shooting rather than injury or restriction
james harden.web_narrative: Harden missed his 3PM over 1 prop by going 0-for-6 from three-point range, a cold shooting performance. The 130-93 blowout loss did not appear to limit his attempts, as he shot six threes on normal volume.

karl-anthony towns.detail: Played 26 minutes in a 37-point blowout win; reduced minutes consistent with garbage time, not an injury restriction

mikal bridges.detail: Played 30 minutes in a blowout win; no flags or injury information available
